chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.1122 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.6183/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.6184/2025 (Exp/A) 3. For hearing of bail application ------------------------- 05.05.2025 Mr. Israr Ahmed Abro, advocate for applicant ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Muhammad Khalid Adnan son of Muhammad Aslam Javed, seeks protective bail in FIR No.479/2015, registered at P.S. FIA, AHT Circle, Karachi for offence under sections 420, 468, 471, 109, PPC. Learned counsel for applicant submits that applicant was unaware about registration of aforesaid FIR and he has not intentionally absconded; that he is a law abiding citizen and intends to surrender before the learned trial Court concerned but he apprehends his arrest in the wake of NBW issued against him. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail is granted to applicant/accused above named, for a period of three days from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- (Rupees twenty five thousand) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. Operation of NBW issued against the applicant/accused is suspended for three days. Applicant/ accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court concerned in the aforesaid period and join the investigation/ trial forthwith. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of three days from today or whenever applicant surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of three days from today or whenever applicant surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear, in case, applicant/accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stands automatically forfeited. The instant criminal bail application is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
